content:
感謝各位守密人的支持！
《忘卻前夜》OST：無還的血與沙，今日發佈～歡迎大家收聽、下載及分享～如果有基於OST的二次創作，也歡迎分享給我們！ （二創請遵照同人規則，OST內容請勿商用）

忘卻前夜OST：無還的血與沙
沙漠裡的太陽和其他地方並不一樣，它蒼白、刺眼而酷烈，從未有過溫柔的一面。野獸無法想像你口中所描述的春天，那麼就請你替他去看一看，那所謂真正的太陽吧。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
規劃：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

《Morimens》OST：《Blood and Sand Without Return》 was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

《Morimens》OST：《Blood and Sand Without Return》 
The sun in the desert is unlike anywhere else; it's pale, glaring, and fierce, never showing a gentle side. Beasts can't imagine the spring you describe, so go see the so-called real sun for them.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘卻前夜OST：無還的血與沙

content:
**01.黃沙與野獸-Beast of the Yellow Sands-**

在庫西沙漠之中，風沙是永不停歇的常客，漫天飛舞的沙礫會灌進活人的口鼻，也會掩埋死去的、不知姓名的屍體。
只有渴求血肉的野獸，會在風中細細嗅尋、那份甘美盛宴的氣息。
In the Kushi Desert, the wind and sand are constant visitors. The flying sand will fill the mouths and noses of the living and bury the nameless bodies of the dead.
Only the beasts that crave for flesh and blood will carefully sniff the smell of the sweet feast in the wind.
thread_title: 忘卻前夜OST：無還的血與沙

content:
**02.猩紅漩渦-Crimson Snare-**

殺戮、仇恨、瘋狂與痛苦，戰場從不缺少這些。當你將性命賭上怪物的牌桌時，就理應想到會引起一場怎樣的猩紅漩渦。
Killing, hatred, madness and pain, the battlefield is never short of these. When you bet your life on the monster's card table, you should think about what kind of scarlet vortex it will cause.
thread_title: 忘卻前夜OST：無還的血與沙

content:
**03.沐浴鮮血的紅日-Bloodied Sunset-**

血紅的夕陽下，是浸滿鮮血的黃沙。
最強大的戰士佇立在即將沉入黑夜的戰場，回憶舊日里金色的火焰與榮光。
無數尖叫的禿鷹飛起，遮擋住了最後的日光。在偉大的東徵之下，盡是擠滿沙漠的亡靈，為他共同陪葬。
Under the blood-red sunset, there is yellow sand soaked with blood.
The most powerful warrior stands on the battlefield that is about to sink into the night, recalling the golden flames and glory of the past.
Countless screaming vultures fly up, blocking the last sunlight. Under the great crusade, the desert is filled with dead souls, buried together with him.
thread_title: 忘卻前夜OST：無還的血與沙
忘卻前夜OST：無還的血與沙

content:
<:evil:1356083443020337152> 以上就是本次OST的全部曲目囉~
